allow: Bash(node -e "const D=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db=new D\(':memory:'\); console.log\('better-sqlite3 OK:', db.prepare\('select sqlite_version\(\) v'\).get\(\).v\)")
Bash(node -e "const D=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const db=new D\(':memory:'\); console.log\('OK:', db.prepare\('select sqlite_version\(\) v'\).get\(\).v\)")
Bash(mysql -uroot -e "SELECT 'connected' as status, VERSION\(\) as v;")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -uhuobao -pchange_me -e "SELECT 'connected' as s, VERSION\(\) as v; SHOW DATABASES LIKE 'huobao_drama';")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -uhuobao -p'change_me' -e "USE huobao_drama; SELECT 'huobao connected' as s; SHOW TABLES;")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -uroot -p'tJF!19920722' huobao_drama -e "SHOW TABLES; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as table_count FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='huobao_drama';")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -uroot -p'tJF!19920722' -e "DROP DATABASE huobao_drama; CREATE DATABASE huobao_drama DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -uroot -p'tJF!19920722' huobao_drama -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as table_count FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='huobao_drama'; SHOW TABLES;")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -uroot -p'tJF!19920722' huobao_drama -e "DESCRIBE storyboard_characters; SHOW KEYS FROM storyboard_characters;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/huobao_drama.db "SELECT 'dramas' as t, COUNT\(*\) FROM dramas UNION ALL SELECT 'episodes', COUNT\(*\) FROM episodes UNION ALL SELECT 'characters', COUNT\(*\) FROM characters UNION ALL SELECT 'storyboards', COUNT\(*\) FROM storyboards UNION ALL SELECT 'ai_service_configs', COUNT\(*\) FROM ai_service_configs UNION ALL SELECT 'agent_configs', COUNT\(*\) FROM agent_configs;")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('deps.better-sqlite3:', p.dependencies['better-sqlite3'] || 'none'\); console.log\('devDeps.better-sqlite3:', p.devDependencies['better-sqlite3'] || 'none'\);")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -uroot -p'tJF!19920722' huobao_drama -e "DELETE FROM episodes; DELETE FROM dramas;")
Bash(/usr/local/mysql/bin/mysql -uroot -p'tJF!19920722' huobao_drama -e "SELECT 'dramas' t, COUNT\(*\) c FROM dramas UNION ALL SELECT 'episodes', COUNT\(*\) FROM episodes;")
